hero.title: The Shipping News
hero.reason: In honor of National Tape Measure Day, this film features a character who rediscovers their family's past and finds a new sense of purpose, much like how a tape measure can help us measure and understand our surroundings.
hero.blurb: This movie is a nuanced exploration of family, identity, and the power of storytelling. With a strong cast and beautiful scenery, it's a great choice for anyone looking for a thoughtful drama.

released.title: The Kingdom
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this action-packed thriller still holds up with its gripping storyline and impressive action sequences.
released.blurb: This movie is a thrilling ride from start to finish, with a talented cast and impressive stunts. If you're a fan of action movies, you won't want to miss this one.

birthday.title: Caddyshack
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Tim Conway, born May 14, 1933, this classic comedy is one of his most iconic roles and still holds up today as a hilarious and lighthearted golf-themed romp.
birthday.blurb: This movie is a comedy classic, with a talented cast and hilarious storyline. If you're a fan of golf or just looking for a lighthearted laugh, Caddyshack is a great choice.

awful.title: I Know Who Killed Me
awful.reason: This psychological thriller is infamous for its convoluted plot and poor acting, making it a great example of a movie that's so bad it's good.
awful.blurb: This movie is a messy and confusing thriller that's more likely to induce headaches than suspense. With a convoluted plot and poor acting, it's a great choice for anyone looking for a laughably bad movie.
